flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of the Arts are 36% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($38.3k vs $59.5k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.1% at University of the Arts exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($23.2k debt amortized over 10 years vs $38.3k earnings).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 48% at University of the Arts vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.1k vs 2.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of the Arts rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.7k → $31.0k).
